summary: Central config tasks 4-8: add ?view=raw to dashboard config API, expand migration script to read opencode.json and config.yaml, add rollback(targetVersion) and validateIntegrity(configPath) to central-config-state.js, update docs/central-config.md with raw endpoint and rollback sections.
